name: claude-hooks-task-state-machine
tags: task, state machine, status, transitions, open, active, done, abandoned, blocked, handle_update, is_valid_transition
body:
Task status state machine (as of June 2026, review state removed):

open → active → done
active → open        (requeue)
blocked → active     (unblock)
any state → abandoned

handle_update() in src/tools/tasks.py is the ONLY path for status transitions — it calls is_valid_transition() to enforce the machine.
Nodes must NEVER run `UPDATE open_tasks SET status=...` directly — bypasses the guard and breaks gate enforcement.
